message:
refactor(test): simplify deprecated command tests to use CLI entry point

Refactors skills.test.ts to test deprecated commands via the CLI entry
point rather than importing individual command functions:

- Removes direct imports of install/uninstall/installed/update commands
- Adds runDeprecatedCommand helper that invokes CLI with process.argv
- Preserves and restores process.argv in beforeEach/afterEach
- Uses dynamic import with cache-busting query param

This approach better reflects actual CLI usage and is more maintainable
as command implementations change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
